title: GEAR AID Revivex Down Care Kit for Jackets and Sleeping Bags and Repair Patches
description:
GEAR AID makes it quick and easy to clean and condition all types of dive equipment with Revivex B.C.D. Cleaner, previously known as BC Life. This complete and balanced maintenance system effectively removes salt and chlorine crystals from the inside of the bladder and breaks down salt and chlorine on the outside, too. With its silicone conditioning formula, this cleaner extends the life of all B.C.D. parts, from rubber fittings and valves to the shell. It’s safe to use on all dive equipment and scuba gear.
Deals Only Web Store
Our Store

GEAR AID Revivex Down Care Kit for Jackets and Sleeping Bags and Repair Patches

Wash, protect and fix down jackets, sleeping bags, and other down-filled gear with the Revivex Down Care Kit. This essential kit includes the gentle Revivex Down Cleaner soap, which restores loft without stripping natural oils, and six Tenacious Tape Mini Patches (3 clear and 3 black nylon).

Key Features

  • Restore loft and wash down jackets, vests, sleeping bags and more with Revivex Down Cleaner (10 fl oz); even works with down-filled pillows, comforters, and treated down
  • Use this concentrated and gentle detergent without added fragrances, softeners or optical brighteners; cleans 10 jackets or 5 sleeping bags
  • Peel-and-stick the included Tenacious Tape Mini Patches (1.5” x 2”) to repair a hole in puff jackets and sleeping bags; includes six washable and waterproof patches
  • Spray on the Revivex Durable Water Repellent (10.5 oz) to add water repellency to down jackets and sleeping bags all season long
  • Packaging may vary

Product Specifications

  • MPN: GARVXDCWBNDL-AMZ
  • UPC: 810131706722
  • Size: 10 oz

The washable, peel-and-stick patches are easy to apply and ideal for covering up burn holes or rips and tears on the go. For a total down care system, select the kit with Revivex Durable Water Repellent (DWR) to keep gear and the body dry. Stay warm and comfortable outdoors with the Revivex Down Care Kit.
